calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Appointment Of Receiver And To Appoint Richard B Cole As Receiver
Off Calendar Jun-30-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc.'s Motion For Appointment Of A Receiver And To Appoint Richard B. Cole As Receiver is granted. No opposition has been filed. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED. (EAH/612)

Mo For Appointment Of A Receiver And To Appoint Richard B. Cole As Receiver
Off Calendar Apr-16-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc.'s Motion For Appointment Of A Receiver And To Appoint Richard B. Cole As Receiver is ordered off calendar. The notice was insufficient per C.C.P. Sections 1005 and 1013. The motion was filed on March 19, 2009. The first day this motion could have been heard is April 20, 2009. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
